known_issues: On mobile devices, the file name text overflows/extends outside the layout (not responsive).

existing_features.title: Fix mobile responsiveness so long filenames never overflow outside the layout in all places filenames are displayed (selected file list on the home/create page, upload progress status card, and file list on the paste view page). Use responsive layout rules (e.g., allow wrapping/stacking on small screens, ensure flex children have min-width:0, and apply truncation or break-word behavior as appropriate) so the UI stays within the viewport on narrow devices.

Update the home page (CreatePastePage at route “/”) to look more professional through UI/UX polish only: improve visual hierarchy, spacing, typography, and section structure for the hero/intro and the create form while keeping the existing functionality and wording intent. Ensure the page feels cohesive in both light and dark mode.

Apply a single coherent visual theme across the home/create page and paste view page to reinforce a professional look (e.g., a neutral, modern editorial style with subtle borders, consistent card elevation, and restrained accent usage). Enforce the theme consistently across key components without introducing new product features.

new_feature_requests.summary: Improve home page to look more professional (UI/UX polish)
